# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.6.2
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - network.host=0.0.0.0
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    networks:
      - elk

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.6.2
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
    volumes:
      - kbdata:/usr/share/kibana/data
    networks:
      - elk
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.6.2
    volumes:
      - lsdata:/usr/share/logstash/data
    networks:
      - elk
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  apm_server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.6.2
    volumes:
      - apmdata:/usr/share/apm-server/data
    networks:
      - elk
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

networks:
  elk: {}

volumes:
  esdata:
    driver: local
  kbdata:
    driver: local
  lsdata:
    driver: local
  apmdata:
    driver: local
